history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A low-angle, night-time, street-level shot captures two people on custom motorcycles parked on a sidewalk next to a busy road. The person in the foreground, on the right, is wearing a black leather jacket, blue jeans, a black helmet, and a black face mask, looking back over their shoulder. Their motorcycle, a cafe racer or similar custom build, features visible suspension and exhaust. To the left, another person is partially visible on their motorcycle, also wearing dark clothing and sneakers. The background shows a street with traffic lights displaying red, streetlights casting a glow, and buildings with illuminated signs, including what appears to be a gas station. The overall lighting is dim, with strong contrasts between the artificial lights and the dark sky, creating a moody, urban atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, punctuated by the red of the traffic lights, the yellow of the streetlights, and the white and blue streaks of light from moving vehicles and lamps. The style is realistic with a cinematic, slightly gritty feel.
